defmodule KVStore do
  @doc """
  Adds or updates a key-value pair in the store.
  """
  def put(store, key, value) do
    case [[SLOT keyfind_call]] do
      nil -> store ++ [{key, value}]
      _ -> [[SLOT update_replace]]
    end
  end

  @doc """
  Retrieves a value by key.
  Returns {:ok, value} or [[SLOT not_found]]
  """
  def get(store, key) do
    case List.keyfind(store, key, 0) do
      [[SLOT match_pin]] -> {:ok, value}
      nil -> {:error, :not_found}
    end
  end

  @doc """
  Removes a key-value pair from the store.
  """
  def delete(store, key) do
    [[SLOT delete_call]]
  end
end

slots.name: keyfind_call
decoys: Enum.find(store, fn x -> elem(x, 0) == key end)

prompt: Wire up the keyfind/keyreplace/keydelete calls and the match-pin pattern.
